abstract: The identifier for the rule list.
overview:
## Discussion

You specify the identifier for your rule lists at compile time in the [doc://com.apple.webkit/documentation/WebKit/WKContentRuleListStore/compileContentRuleList(forIdentifier:encodedContentRuleList:completionHandler:)] method of [doc://com.apple.webkit/documentation/WebKit/WKContentRuleListStore]. You also use this identifier to look up the rules list later.

# identifier

**Instance Property**

The identifier for the rule list.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor var identifier: String! { get }
```

## Discussion

You specify the identifier for your rule lists at compile time in the [doc://com.apple.webkit/documentation/WebKit/WKContentRuleListStore/compileContentRuleList(forIdentifier:encodedContentRuleList:completionHandler:)] method of [doc://com.apple.webkit/documentation/WebKit/WKContentRuleListStore]. You also use this identifier to look up the rules list later.
